node.title: Uber On Campus / Pool Hiring Placement Drive for 2026 batch.

article.title: Uber On Campus / Pool Hiring Placement Drive for 2026 batch.
article.content:
Has Uber visited any colleges for SDE-1 or SDE 6-month intern roles for the 2026 batch? If yes then could you please share what the process was like and what all was asked in the rounds. It would be a great help if you could share some resources or questions. 
Thank You.
